title: Back in Circulation
writer: Warren Duff, Adela Rogers St. Johns, Seton I. Miller
actors: Pat O'Brien, Joan Blondell, Margaret Lindsay
plot: Morning Express ace reporter 'Timmy' Blake uses her wiles and charms to get the scoop on rival papers, and keep her editor happy. When the Express gets a tip that a wealthy old man was poisoned and 'Timmy' spots the young widow in...
